name: chia-rs

metadata.name: chia-rs
metadata.summary: Code useful for implementing chia consensus.

documentation: The `chia_rs` wheel contains python bindings for code from the `chia` crate.

functions.name: python.chia_rs.sized_byte_class.hexstr_to_bytes
documentation: Converts a hex string into bytes, removing the 0x if it's present.

classes.name: python.chia_rs.sized_byte_class.SizedBytes

methods.name: python.chia_rs.sized_byte_class.SizedBytes.__init__
documentation: This is just a partial exposure of the underlying bytes constructor.  Liskov...

A streamable type that subclasses "bytes" but requires instances
to be a certain, fixed size specified by the `._size` class attribute.

methods.name: python.chia_rs.struct_stream.StructStream.__init__
documentation: This is just a partial exposure of the underlying int constructor.  Liskov...

class_variables.name: python.chia_rs.struct_stream.StructStream.MINIMUM
documentation:
Create a class that can parse and stream itself based on a struct.pack template string. This is only meant to be
a base class for further derivation and it's not recommended to instantiate it directly.
